research.title: Rapid Response
research.summary: Emerging vulnerabilities create immediate pressure for security teams. The challenge isn’t determining whether a CVE exists—it’s determining whether it can actually be exploited in your environment before attackers move faster than your remediation process..

research.title: CVE-2026-27771 | Gitea Container Registry Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
research.summary: Gitea contains a high-severity authentication bypass vulnerability affecting the built-in container and package registry functionality. CVE-2026-27771 allows unauthenticated remote attackers to retrieve private container images and package artifacts without.

research.title: Looting UniFi Controllers: Detecting and Weaponizing CVE-2026-22557
research.summary: A CVSS 10.0 path traversal in UniFi Network Application lets unauthenticated attackers read controller backups, extract credentials, and take over every managed device on the network. Bishop Fox breaks down the attack paths, the preconditions, and a safe.

research.title: What’s in the container? Analyzing vulnerabilities, risks and protection with Kaspersky Container Security and the KIRA AI assistant

vulns.title: Drupal Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.technicalSummary: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.breakdown: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.whatBroke: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at thinhap/CVE-2026-9082-PoC.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/thinhap/CVE-2026-9082-PoC
cd CVE-2026-9082-PoC
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Core
credential access from service context
webshell or command execution follow-up
internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: Exploit Development Lab: 12 progressive classes from stack buffer overflow to Windows kernel exploitation.
